description_long: This is a pair of modern, angular sunglasses featuring a bold, rectangular frame with a full-rim design. The frame is predominantly black with striking gold accents along the temples and bridge, giving it a stylish and urban aesthetic. The lenses are large, slightly oversized, and tinted with a dark gradient, providing both sun protection and a fashionable look. The temples are straight and moderately thick, with a subtle step-down design near the hinges for added visual interest. The bridge is solid and flat, connecting the two lenses seamlessly with a gold bar detail. No visible brand logo or insignia is present on the frame or lenses.
description: Rectangular, full-rim sunglasses with black and gold frame accents and dark gradient lenses. The design is bold, modern, and urban-inspired.
description_view_0: Side view showing the straight, thick temples with gold accents and the angular frame profile.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the large, rectangular lenses, gold bridge detail, and full-rim frame.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the temple and frame details seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Angled front view emphasizing the bold frame, gold accents, and dark gradient lenses.
attribute_frame_design: Rectangular, full-rim frame with bold, straight lines and moderate thickness. The frame features a flat top and bottom, with slightly rounded corners and a prominent, flat bridge. The temples are straight and thick, with a step-down detail near the hinges.
attribute_lens_tint: Dark gray gradient tint, transitioning from darker at the top to lighter at the bottom. The lenses are opaque enough to provide sun protection but still allow some visibility of the eyes.
attribute_bridge_style: Flat, solid bridge with a gold accent bar spanning the top, connecting the two lenses seamlessly. The bridge is wide and integrated into the frame, with no visible nose pads.
attribute_temple_detailing: Temples are straight, moderately thick, and feature gold accent bands near the hinges. The step-down design adds a layered visual effect, and the ends are slightly curved for comfort.
